context: Tests whether the agent implements the full 5-layer Authâ†’Clientâ†’Fetcherâ†’Builderâ†’DomainEntity pattern with correct file placement, class structure, and constants as prescribed for Ruby API client integrations.

checklist.name: Auth file exists
checklist.description: app/services/weather_service/auth.rb exists and defines a class named Auth within a module namespace

checklist.name: Client file exists
checklist.description: app/services/weather_service/client.rb exists and defines a class named Client within the same module namespace

checklist.name: Fetcher file exists
checklist.description: app/services/weather_service/fetcher.rb exists and defines a class named Fetcher within the same module namespace

checklist.name: Builder file exists
checklist.description: app/services/weather_service/builder.rb exists and defines a class named Builder within the same module namespace

checklist.name: Domain entity file exists
checklist.description: A domain entity file (e.g. reading.rb) exists in app/services/weather_service/ and defines a class within the module namespace

checklist.name: Auth self.default
checklist.description: Auth class defines a self.default class method that reads credentials from configuration (not hardcoded values)

checklist.name: Auth token caching
checklist.description: Auth#token method caches the token in an instance variable (pattern: return @token if @token)

checklist.name: Client::Error class
checklist.description: Client class defines a nested Error class inheriting from StandardError

checklist.name: Client constants
checklist.description: Client class defines MISSING_CONFIGURATION_ERROR string constant, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT, and DEFAULT_RETRIES numeric constants

checklist.name: Fetcher DI constructor
checklist.description: Fetcher initializer accepts client as positional argument and data_builder and default_query as keyword arguments

checklist.name: Fetcher constants
checklist.description: Fetcher class defines MAX_RETRIES and RETRY_DELAY_IN_SECONDS constants

checklist.name: Builder attribute filtering
checklist.description: Builder#build method uses slice (or select/filter) to restrict output fields to a whitelist â€” does NOT return all raw API fields

checklist.name: Entity ATTRIBUTES constant
checklist.description: Domain entity defines an ATTRIBUTES frozen array constant listing the whitelisted field names

checklist.name: Entity DEFAULT_QUERY constant
checklist.description: Domain entity defines a DEFAULT_QUERY string constant containing a SQL or query string

checklist.name: README present
checklist.description: A README.md file is present in the module directory
